rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verify capabilities BEFORE asserting, not after.
Local scheduled tasks catch up on wake.
Training platform = Claude Code (CLI + Desktop) + Cowork.
Source URL + type label — mandatory. No URL = mark [SOURCE NEEDED].

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Source URL + type label — mandatory. Facts must match what the URL actually says.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Zombie stat guard. Round-number AI failure rates are almost always zombie stats.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: The '1 in 20 teams' derives from CircleCI 2026 (28.7M workflows, large sample, clear methodology, independent critique by Bowley). The '54-95%' and '5-22%' are ranges across five independent sources at L4 convergence. Neither is a zombie stat.

CircleCI 2026 report (April 2026) and Bowley critique (April 2026) within 6-month window as of 2026-05-03. Access-Trust Gap sources (Pattern 47, updated 2026-03-28) also within window. Antspace BYOC staging claim dated 2026-Q1 — within window; pre-cohort re-check required.

citations_checked.claim: CircleCI 2026 *Five Takeaways* report, (28 million+ workflow runs across thousands of engineering teams): +59% generation year-over-year, -7% median main-branch throughput, only 1 in 20 teams scaling both.
citations_checked.notes: FIXED (was blocking): body now reads '28 million+ workflow runs across thousands of engineering teams'. CircleCI report confirms 'more than 28 million CI/CD workflows across thousands of engineering teams' (methodology note: 28,738,317 workflows). +59%, -7%, and 1-in-20 figures all verified correct. No factual mismatch.
